name: Barking Mad

notes: Binding review validated 154 direct products and all 64 frozen rows.
POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
Only explicit positive allergen signals are retained; no unsupported negatives, may-contain absence, or cross-contact conclusion is made.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
Focused readback confirms exact current catalog and surface boundary.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: focused readback assertions for 154 products, four in-scope surfaces, homepage exclusion, 64 reconciliations, identity, evidence references, and exclusions
diff -u first-run snapshots against second-run outputs

notes: Return the result as blocked_unverifiable without marking codex_verified.
Preserve narrow explicit positive ingredient evidence during any later repair while treating complete arrays, negatives, and cross-contact as unavailable.
Do not treat currentProductCount=0 as proof of an empty current catalog or confirmed count drift.
Reconcile the packet inconsistency between unresolvedSurfaceCount=0 and the happy-hour surface marked error/unresolved before relying on those metrics.
POC apply completed without ledger, item-check, or codex_verified edits.
Coordinator-only POC closeout packet generated after serialized APPLY.
